parameters.jsCode:
const d = $json;

const dedup_key = d.email?.trim() ||
                  d.linkedin_url?.trim() ||
                  (d.person_name + "_" + d.company_name)
                  .toLowerCase().replace(/\s+/g, "_");

return {
  json: {
    company_linkedin_url: d.company_linkedin_url || "",
    company_name:         d.company_name         || "",
    company_id:           d.company_id           || "",
    domain:               d.domain               || "",
    industry:             d.industry             || d.company_industry || "",
    company_size:         d.company_size         || "",
    company_location:     d.company_location     || "",
    data_source_company:  d.data_source_company  || "apollo",
    person_name:          d.person_name          || "",
    title:                d.title                || "",
    seniority:            d.seniority            || "",
    email:                d.email                || "",
    all_emails:           (d.all_emails || "").substring(0, 500),
    phone:                d.phone                || "",
    person_linkedin_url:  d.linkedin_url         || "",
    person_location:      d.location             || "",
    data_source_person:   d.data_source_person   || "apollo",
    enriched_at:          d.enriched_at          || new Date().toISOString(),
    dedup_key:            dedup_key
  }
};
